items.prompt: After learn_sv_tb, a natural next course for UVM methodology is…
items.explain: The syllabus points SV TB graduates toward learn_uvm2017 for agents and sequences.

items.prompt: If you want bounded proofs and vacuity literacy after SVA timeline practice…
items.explain: learn_formal builds on SVA timeline skills from this course.

items.prompt: Browser labs alone are enough to skip real-shell examples on the wrap checklist.
items.explain: The wrap asks you to close gaps on whichever track you leaned on less.

items.prompt: Which skill belongs to the learn_sv_tb ladder you just finished?
choices: Virtual interface wiring for class-based TB
items.explain: Virtual interfaces were covered in module seven of this course.

items.prompt: Directed TB fluency helps even if your next course is UVM.
items.explain: UVM agents still drive pins through interfaces and checks you already practiced.
